title: PDCBVC rule BR-001
text:
Program: PDCBVC
Type: business_rule
Title: PDCBVC rule BR-001
Embedding: PDCBVC business rule BR-001 in scope PDCBVC. If NOT (TWCOB-FASE = '1' OR TWCOB-FASE = '2') then JUMP -> ABEND00. Category=error. Kind=state. Severity=fatal.
Content:
content.action: JUMP -> ABEND00
content.category: error
content.condition: NOT (TWCOB-FASE = '1' OR TWCOB-FASE = '2')
content.evidence.from: PDCBVC
content.evidence.raw_evidence: GO TO ABEND00.
content.evidence.to: ABEND00

title: PDCBVC cobol-rekt workflow
text:
Program: PDCBVC
Source system: cobol-rekt knowledge-base_rag
Chunk type: workflow
Chunk id: PDCBVC.CBL__workflow__BROWSE-FASE1
Source file: chunks\PDCBVC.CBL__workflow__BROWSE-FASE1.json
Content:
Start of browse phase
BROWSE-FASE1 orchestrates:
  - SEND-PDCBVC1 (CICS: Send): Send PDCBVC1 map
  - PREPARA-MAP
  - CALCOLA-NPAG: Calculation of the number of pages to be displayed
  - LINK-PD1VOCI (CICS: Link): Link to the VOCABULARY CONTROL function (PD1VOCI)
  - INIZ-PARAM: Preparation of parameters for PD1VOCI function
  - PREP-LINK-PD1FS00: Preparation of link for PD1FS00 function
  - READ-TAB-SEMAF: Reading the status of the semophore table from Oracle ORAMF.SEMAFORO
